emails.subject: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement
emails.body: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement Attached is the referenced agreement. Let me know if the notice information is OK with you. If so, I'll get it signed by Craig Breslau today, then bring it to you for countersignature. Thinking about that, what's your title? I'm not sure you have the authority to sign documents w/o special authority...

emails.subject: Re: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement
emails.body: Re: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement The notice information looks fine. I am a Director don't know about signing the docs though... thanks Sheri From: Tana Jones on 11/30/2000 09:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement
emails.body: Re: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement The notice information looks fine. I am a Director don't know about signing the docs though... thanks Sheri From: Tana Jones on 11/30/2000 09:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Energy Gateway Provider Agreement
emails.body: I spoke to Mark Taylor about your signing authority, and he agrees that you do not have the authority to execute documents on your own, but as long as you are only co-signing documents signed by an authorized officer as a control measure we're OK. Sheri Thomas 11/30/2000 10:27 AM
